local.title: Local Presence
local.desc: HQ between Marbella and Malaga, with a second office in Palma de Mallorca.

process.label: The Process

steps.1: Specifying your needs, installation site assessment. We analyse the structural capacity, access and conditions of your location.
steps.2: All details in construction and delivery are sorted out. Permits are applied for. We create a detailed plan and timeline.
steps.3: Preparation work is done on site. This includes structural reinforcement if needed, plumbing preparation and access setup.
steps.4: The pool construction is built in our facility using our lightweight, durable technology. Quality controlled at every stage.
steps.5: The built pool shell is delivered and installed on your terrace. We handle all the logistics and crane operations if needed.
steps.6: Delivery inspection, filling and testing. We verify everything works perfectly before handing over the keys to your new pool.

projects.3: Set in the prestigious urbanization of El Higuerón, this apartment now counts with an exquisite terrace pool.

hero.label: Complete Pool Overhauls
hero.desc: Looking to renovate your pool in the Marbella, Málaga, Nerja, Torrevieja, Alicante or Mallorca region? We have experience from the most demanding pool renovations.

why.label: Why Choose Us
why.desc: Our renovation process is a complete technological and aesthetic overhaul. We upgrade everything from filtration to finish.

structural.title: Structural Reinforcement
structural.desc: We reinforce your pool's foundation and walls, ensuring decades of trouble-free use with our 35-year guarantee.

filtration.title: Modern Filtration
filtration.desc: Upgrading with energy-efficient circulation and filtration for crystal-clear water year-round.

finishes.title: Premium Finishes
finishes.desc: From artisanal tiling to smooth plaster finishes, we use only the finest materials for the Mediterranean climate.

plumbing.title: Plumbing Overhaul
plumbing.desc: Complete replacement of aging plumbing with modern, durable piping and connections.

electrical.title: Electrical Upgrades
electrical.desc: Smart lighting, automated covers, and energy-efficient heating systems integrated seamlessly.

surrounding.title: Surrounding Areas
surrounding.desc: We can also renovate terraces, decking, drainage, and landscaping around your pool.

guarantee.desc: Our confidence is built on Scandinavian engineering standards and decades of experience in the Mediterranean climate.

areas.desc: Pool renovation services across Sweden's most beautiful regions.

technical.title: Pool Renovation & Leak Repair with EPS
technical.desc: Is your pool showing signs of wear, leakage, or outdated finishes? Traditional pool repair methods can involve extensive excavation and replacement, which can be both very costly and time-consuming. Our revolutionary pool renovation and leak repair method offer a modern and long-lasting solution using compact and highly durable EPS—engineered for structural integrity, flexibility and style.

leak_proof.title: Leak-Proof Solution
leak_proof.desc: Their non-porous construction creates a seamless barrier that eliminates water loss and protects underlying structures.

durability.title: Durability
durability.desc: Resistant to moisture, rot, chemicals, and UV exposure, fiber composites are used in some of the most critical parts of airplanes.

strength.title: Lightweight & Strong
strength.desc: Unlike traditional concrete or wood-based materials, composite boards combine strength with easy handling and installation.

cost.title: Cost-Effective
cost.desc: By minimizing the need for extensive excavation and replacement, EPS provide a more economical repair solution.

finishes.title: A Finish That Fits Your Style
finishes.desc: Once installed, the fiber composite surface can be finished in virtually any style to match your design vision:

liners.title: Pool Liners
liners.desc: Choose from a wide range of colors and textures for a clean, modern look.

mosaic.title: Ceramic or Glass Mosaic
mosaic.desc: Add elegance and luxury with intricate tilework.

tiles.title: Traditional Tiles
tiles.desc: For a classic finish, our fiber boards provide a perfect base for all types of tile applications.

arelite.label: Finish samples
arelite.title: Arelite — finish catalogue
arelite.desc: The Arelite collection shows sample finishes for your pool surface: colours, textures and styles you can combine with your renovation. Open the PDF to explore the range we offer and shortlist options with our team before you decide.

cta.desc: Free consultation and no-obligation quote for your pool renovation.

hero.label: Engineering Excellence
hero.desc: We design and build custom-made terrace pools—German EPS cores, Scandinavian standards, engineered for your exact space.

lightweight.title: Lightweight Construction
lightweight.desc: Engineered to be significantly lighter than traditional concrete, ideal for terraces, rooftops, and upper floors.

durability.title: Multi-Layer Durability
durability.desc: Proprietary multi-layer construction creates an incredibly strong structure that maintains integrity for decades.

warranty.title: 35-Year Warranty
warranty.desc: We back our technology with an industry-leading 35-year structural warranty. Engineering certainty.

filtration.title: Advanced Filtration
filtration.desc: State-of-the-art circulation and filtration for crystal clear water with minimal energy use.

climate.title: Climate Optimised
climate.desc: Engineered for the Swedish Mediterranean climate, with UV resistance and thermal management.

efficiency.title: Energy Efficient
efficiency.desc: From insulated walls to smart pumps, reducing your long-term operating costs.

putting_tech.label: Putting Tech to Work
putting_tech.title: Having the best tech at hand
putting_tech.p1: There are many materials available for constructing pools, each with their own best use cases – fibreglass, concrete, steel and various composite systems. It is not hard to imagine how important it is to use the correct material for a construction of the size, exposure and lifespan of a pool.
putting_tech.p2_prefix: Scandinavian Quality is probably the only pool constructor in Spain that can
putting_tech.p2_bold: always offer the ideal technology for your pool.
putting_tech.p3: This means we don't have to make compromises when choosing the best way to build your pool.
putting_tech.p4_suffix: which would be the best material? In most cases, it should be compact, light, resistant and durable.

premier_material.label: Ultimate in Materials
premier_material.title: The Premier Material for Density Critical Applications
premier_material.card_title: Custom-Made EPS Pools — German Core Material
premier_material.card_desc: Terrace pools are our speciality: we use premium EPS sourced from Germany and build every pool to your project—dimensions, access and finish—rather than selling off-the-shelf units.
premier_material.card_detail: Every detail is meticulously considered to meet your unique needs.

benefits.lightweight: Lightweight yet robust, ensuring efficiency without compromise
benefits.durability: Timeless durability with minimal maintenance, year after year
benefits.resistance: Superior resistance to moisture and corrosion, perfect for pool environments

fact_box.label: Lightweight. Powerful. Built for the Future.
fact_box.title: Fact Box — EPS Technology (Germany)
fact_box.intro: We build custom-made terrace pools using EPS (expanded polystyrene) sourced from Germany. It delivers an outstanding strength-to-weight ratio, insulation and dimensional stability—ideal for precision-engineered pool structures that match your exact footprint.
fact_box.tagline: German EPS and bespoke manufacturing: your pool is made to measure, not pulled from a catalogue.
fact_box.why_title: Why German EPS for Custom Pools?

strength.title: Lightweight structure, serious strength
strength.desc: EPS-based shells stay far lighter than traditional concrete pools—crucial for terraces and rooftops—while our structural build-up delivers long-term reliability.

maintenance.title: Clean, sealed surfaces
maintenance.desc: Properly laminated and finished EPS systems avoid rust and heavy rework, keeping maintenance predictable season after season.

engineering.title: Truly custom geometry
engineering.desc: Every pool is engineered to your drawings: tight corners, curves, steps and access constraints—custom-made EPS pools, not one-size-fits-all.

sustainable.title: Insulated, efficient core
sustainable.desc: EPS brings thermal insulation to the structure, supporting stable water temperatures and smarter energy use over the life of the pool.

where_items.custom_built: Bespoke terrace pools — every shell is engineered to your drawings and space.
where_items.roof_terrace: Terraces & rooftops — where weight limits and access make lightweight EPS the smart choice.
where_items.insulation: Thermal performance — an insulated EPS core helps stabilise water temperature.
where_items.precision: Renovations & tight plots — precision fit where standard pool kits cannot go.
where_items.solutions: German EPS, Scandinavian execution — quality materials and finishes tailored to your design.

warranty_section.desc: Market-leading 35-year warranty on our custom-made EPS terrace pools and pool renovations. Tested and proven in the Mediterranean environment for over two decades.

hero.label: TAILOR MADE TERRACE POOLS
hero.desc: Turn your outdoor space into a stylish wellness retreat with our most in-demand Terrace Pool – ideal for terraces, patios or gardens.
